name: Tee It Up - Port Huron
address: 318 Grand River Ave, Port Huron, MI 48060
about: Tee It Up - Port Huron is a golf simulator venue located inside The Wrigley Center in downtown Port Huron. It features Trackman4 technology, providing a hyper-realistic golf experience with detailed data analysis for practice or play on virtual courses. The venue offers leagues, lessons, and memberships, with special perks like discounts and priority tee times for members. They are closed for the summer and typically operate with standard hours, but also accommodate private parties by appointment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman4 technology for realistic simulation and detailed swing analysis
Flexible booking options for solo practice, group events, and leagues
Ability to host private parties and events with dedicated bay time

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of on-site alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with tour-proven ball tracking
